text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's been struggling lately, so we go
to pray at a shrine... where for some reason we're
joined by Biwa Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know, these places have all sorts of
rules, and I'm not great with smartsy stuff like
that...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But Hayahide's super smart, so I figured if we
bring her along, I can just do everything exactly
as she says!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Besides, she was the one who suggested I go pray
at the shrine in the first place!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If it were me, I doubt praying would have any
effect. However, it's a fact that issues with
physical performance are closely linked to
psychological factors.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Given Ticket's naive mindset, it's quite possible
that such methods will be... well, I'm sure you get
my drift.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Good. Let's try it out then. Ticket, just do as I
taught you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ALL RIIIGHT! First, I throw the coin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket hurls the coin with all her might.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wh-wha?! Strength is not a necessity here, Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Next, I ring the big bell!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CLATTER! CLANG! CLATTER!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: C-come now, Ticket! That's far too loud!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's fine, it's fine! I gotta give it a good ring, or the
gods in the sky won't hear me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: And lastly! My prayer to the god of the shrine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CLAP, CLAP, CLAP, CLAP!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: RAAAGH! Please listen to MEEE!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hrrngh! You there, god? Please, please, please let me get out of my slump!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket... Hey, Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How long are you going to stand there? That's
enough praying.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, it is? Did every last bit of my wish make
it up there?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's sufficient. I'm sure the god is sick of—I
mean, satisfied with your prayer.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's good. Then I'm sure I'll be doing
better in no time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you know what?! I already feel like a weight
lifted off me!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That's not possible. It's far too soon—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm better! I'm sure of it! HOORAY! The god here is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I did it, I did it! I'm full of energy and poweeer!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It appears that she really has recovered. There's
some truth to mind over matter after all, I
suppose...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether the result of prayer or because of her
earnest personality, Winning Ticket manages to
break out of her slump.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hngh... Hnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Go, wishes, GO! Make it all the way to the god of
the shrine!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... She's not listening to me at all.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I'm feeling kinda hot... And like, all dizzy...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you developing a fever from concentrating
too hard? How is that even possible?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sway... sway...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because she focused so much energy on praying,
Winning Ticket ultimately fails to get out of her
slump.
